description: Checklist for restrictions, roles, whitelists/blacklists, trusted executors, and alternate entrypoints to value-moving functions.
core_invariants: the same policy must protect every path reaching a value-moving internal action
owner/from/beneficiary dimensions must be checked, not only msg.sender
trusted executors/callbacks must prove user intent and target constraints
common_bug_classes: owner not checked in approved withdraw
missing pause modifier on later lifecycle function
connector helper callable through another vault
check_items: Build a call graph to every internal value-moving function
Check role conflict and role revocation effects
Verify pause modifiers on queue/cancel/confirm/claim stages
Check executor calldata target and initiator validation
test_ideas: approve attacker to withdraw restricted owner shares
assign both whitelist and blacklist roles and test burn/redeem
route calldata through trusted executor from attacker
call confirm/claim while withdrawal/reward pause is active
